# holistics_shareable_link (Resource)

A public shareable link to a Holistics Dashboard.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (Number) ID of the resource to share.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type to share. Currently only `Dashboard`.

### Optional

- `dynamic_filter_presets` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets))
- `expired_at` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password to access the link (only set when password_enabled is true).
- `password_enabled` (Boolean)
- `permission_rules` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permission_rules))
- `title` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Shareable link ID.

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets`

Required:

- `dynamic_filter_id` (String) Dynamic filter ID (numeric or string).
- `preset_condition` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition))

Optional:

- `public_hidden` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets.preset_condition`

Required:

- `operator` (String)

Optional:

- `modifier` (String)
- `values` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--permission_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permission_rules`

Optional:

- `row_based` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based))

<a id="nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based"></a>

Required:

- `condition` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based--condition))

<a id="nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permission_rules.row_based.condition`

Required:

Optional:

- `values` (List of String)
